headline: You became a therapist to help, not type
primary_text:
The average therapy session: 50 minutes. The average note: 30 minutes.

That math doesn't work when you're seeing 6-8 clients a day. And the research backs up what you're feeling: 40% of clinicians report burnout from paperwork alone.

JotPsych uses AI to generate clinical documentation from your session recordings — cutting your daily note-writing time by 1-2 hours. HIPAA-compliant and purpose-built for behavioral health providers.

You became a therapist to help people heal, not to spend your evenings charting.
